title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 311.800 - Attorney general may direct prosecuting attorneys to conduct prosecutions
text:
311.800.  Attorney general may direct prosecuting attorneys to conduct prosecutions. — Whenever requested to carry out any of the duties as required by this chapter, the attorney general may, in his discretion, direct the prosecuting attorney of the county to conduct prosecutions and institute suits as required by this chapter.
(RSMo 1939 § 4877)
